serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-23. activate_project --project ~7.3s cold/~1.3s warm. find_symbol --name_path_pattern (broad 70s+, prefer Grep). find_referencing_symbols --name_path + --relative_path FILE. get_symbols_overview ~100ms. Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'.

open_issues.sg23a1_NEW_R23: jsonmarshalignoredeerror NEWLY-REGISTERED linter (18th, cmd/linters/main.go:26 import, :57 register; package name has typo 'jsonmarshalignoredeerror'->'ignoredee'). Flags `x,_:=json.Marshal()` (2lhs blank Lhs[1]) + `_=json.Unmarshal()` (1lhs blank Lhs[0]) where selector base imports encoding/json. Does NOT match MarshalIndent or non-stdlib json pkgs. 19 prod violations, 11 files, NOT in cgo.yml:1040 LINTER_FLAGS. Issue filed R23: triage+enforce. Risk tiers below.
open_issues.sg23a1_sites_severe: safe_outputs_config_generation.go:198 — configJSON,_:=json.Marshal(safeOutputsConfig); return string(configJSON),nil. Function signature returns (string,error) — error path EXISTS but discarded. Marshal fail -> returns '' nil-err -> silent empty safe-outputs config in generated workflow. Clean fix: return err.
open_issues.sg23a1_sites_med_codegen: Write nil bytes into strings.Builder/template -> malformed generated YAML/JSON: compiler_experiments.go:451/457/461 (manual JSON obj build, cfg is any), compiler_pre_activation_job.go:168/172/230, compiler_yaml.go:814 (allowedDomains), cache.go:636/917 (AllowedExtensions), repo_memory.go:717 (AllowedExtensions), mcp_config_file.go:59/60 (existingConfig/ghAwConfig), mcp_config_playwright_renderer.go:80/87 (v any), copilot_logs.go is separate.
open_issues.sg23a1_sites_low_defensible: copilot_logs.go:97 json.Marshal(content.Input) used only for len()/size metric -> fail = inputSize 0, harmless //nolint. String-marshal sites CANNOT fail: args.go:62 (arg string), mcp_renderer_github.go:249 (arg string), mcp_config_playwright_renderer.go:73 (key string), compiler_experiments.go:451 (name string). json.Marshal of a string never errors -> //nolint reason 'marshaling a string cannot fail'.
open_issues.sg23a1_unmarshal_note: mcp_scripts_generator.go:334 `_ = json.Unmarshal(...)` is INSIDE sb.WriteString('...') — a generated-CODE string literal, NOT a real call. Linter (AST-based) will NOT flag it. ZERO real Unmarshal violations.
open_issues.sgbo1_defensible: 2 filepath.Join shape variants - intentional: cli/git.go:303 trailing-slash for git add, cli/fix_command.go:410 Separator-suffix prefix match.

patterns.syscall_def: Defensible IFF (a)callee logs (b)best-effort doc (c)cleanup-defer w/primary (d)impossible-init. sg14a1 meets NONE
patterns.panic_def: exemptions: sync.Once.Do funcLit, BUG: prefix, top-level init() no-receiver, doc 'panics on/if'. ENFORCED.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE selector LINTER_FLAGS. R23 now 8 flags: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib -regexpcompileinfunction -fprintlnsprintf -strconvparseignorederror. Append flag for zero-violation analyzers; refactor///nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.type_assert_safe: Safe single-value .(T): sync.Map/Pool cbs, post-literal-ctor, pass.ResultOf, type-switch. Else need ,ok.
patterns.strconv_parse_anti_R22: x,_:=strconv.Atoi swallows err. Defensible IFF upstream regex/semver guard. Fix: //nolint reason OR mustAtoi helper. ENFORCED R23.
patterns.json_marshal_anti_R23: x,_:=json.Marshal(v) discards err -> nil bytes on failure -> silent corruption. json.Marshal(string|int|bool) CANNOT fail (//nolint 'cannot fail'). json.Marshal(any/map/struct/slice) CAN fail (unsupported types/cycles/MarshalJSON err) -> handle err, esp in codegen writing into strings.Builder (malformed output) or when fn already returns error. _=json.Unmarshal discards err -> partial target. AST linter ignores string-literal codegen (sb.WriteString containing 'json.Unmarshal').
patterns.fast_dismiss_R22: R21 issues closed not_planned <2min by maintainer batch. But R22 zero-vio enforcement findings (sg22a1/a2) WERE ACTED ON within the week (3 linters enforced R23). Signal: zero-vio/low-effort enforce framing lands; re-filing dismissed prod-site issues does not.
patterns.enforce_landed_R23: PROVEN: R22's flagged zero-violation linters (regexpcompileinfunction, fprintlnsprintf) + triaged strconvparseignorederror all enforced by maintainer in cgo.yml:1040 by R23. The 'audit registered-but-unenforced linter -> file enforce issue' strategy demonstrably lands. Highest-ROI sergo strategy.

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks multi-stmt, mkdir/ls/find/wc/cat outside repo, sed (any form incl ranges). Compound 'mkdir && ls' split-checked. go build blocked (so `make golint-custom` cannot run — audit linters via Grep/Read statically). gh issue list --json/--state 'Malformed version:' bug — use `gh api search/issues?q=...` with --jq '.items[]|select(.html_url)'. Glob/Read/Write on /tmp WORKS even when bash blocked; bash CANNOT touch /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory (use Write/Edit tools). safeoutputs JSON stdin via `. < file.json`. create-issue.expires:7d auto-closes sergo trackers. R21: completed-close within hours when fix lands. R22: dismissed not_planned ~2min. R23: zero-vio enforce findings landed within the week (maintainer appended 3 flags).
